pageContext.name: Jean-Luc Picard 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Begin your Star Trek: The Next Generation Chibi® Coin collection with the brilliant captain of the U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Jean-Luc Picard. Naturally, more Starfleet officers will come, so keep an eye out!  Officially licensed, this coin is made from 1oz pure silver and has been colored and shaped to mirror Picard as Chibi art. It showcases Picard in his red Starfleet uniform and of course, his iconic bald head.   The outer box is Star Trek themed which serves as the perfect complement to the coin. The box also includes a large window, allowing you to display your collectible as is! Inside, the coin is placed in an acrylic case for safe storage.   To confirm its legal tender, the effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse of the coin and for further confirmation, a Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box.   It is sure to be popular, so grab yours quick before they zoom away at warp speed!
